examples.en: My teacher is really kind to us.
examples.zh: 我的老師對我們很親切。

examples.en: She wants to be a teacher someday.

img: teacher writing on whiteboard in classroom

examples.en: You should see a doctor about that cough.
The doctor told me to rest more.

img: doctor with stethoscope in white coat

examples.en: The nurse checked my temperature.
My sister works as a nurse.
The farmer gets up before sunrise.
That farmer grows rice and corn.
examples.zh: 那位農夫種稻子和玉米。

img: farmer in field with straw hat

examples.en: He is a great cook at that diner.
examples.zh: 他是那家小餐館的好廚師。

examples.en: The cook made us a warm soup.
The bus driver waved at us.
A good driver stays calm in traffic.
A police officer helped me find the way.
The police officer stopped the car.

img: police officer in uniform on street

examples.en: The firefighter carried the child out.
examples.zh: 消防員把孩子抱了出來。

examples.en: Firefighters are very brave.
The workers finished the job on time.
examples.zh: 工人們準時完成了工作。

examples.en: He is a hard worker.
That singer has an amazing voice.
She dreams of becoming a singer.
The artist painted a beautiful sky.
examples.zh: 那位藝術家畫了美麗的天空。

examples.en: My uncle is a street artist.
examples.zh: 我叔叔是位街頭藝術家。

img: artist painting on canvas with brush

examples.en: The writer signed my book.
examples.zh: 那位作家在我書上簽名。

examples.en: She is a famous writer now.

img: writer typing at desk with notebook

examples.en: The waiter brought our menus.
Please ask the waiter for water.
Every student passed the test.
examples.zh: 每個學生都通過了測驗。

examples.en: He is a college student.
My boss is very busy today.
The boss gave us a day off.
examples.zh: 老闆給我們放了一天假。

img: boss in suit at office desk

examples.en: The manager runs three stores.
Ask the manager for a refund.
The engineer fixed the bridge.
She works as a software engineer.

img: engineer with blueprint and hard hat

examples.en: The lawyer explained my rights.
You may need a good lawyer.
examples.zh: 你可能需要一位好律師。

img: lawyer in suit holding legal documents

examples.en: The accountant checked our budget.
examples.zh: 會計師核對了我們的預算。

examples.en: My mom is an accountant.
The designer made a new logo.
She is a fashion designer.
I see the dentist twice a year.
The dentist pulled my bad tooth.
The chef created a new dish.
He trained to be a chef in France.
examples.zh: 他在法國受訓成為主廚。

img: chef in white hat plating food

examples.en: The pilot landed the plane smoothly.
examples.zh: 機師平穩地降落了飛機。

examples.en: He always wanted to be a pilot.
The scientist ran a new experiment.
She is a well-known scientist.

img: scientist in lab coat with microscope

examples.en: A reporter asked the mayor questions.
The reporter covered the flood.
The photographer took our wedding photos.
examples.zh: 攝影師拍了我們的婚紗照。

examples.en: He is a wildlife photographer.
The programmer fixed the bug fast.
examples.zh: 程式設計師很快修好了漏洞。

examples.en: She works as a game programmer.
The salesperson showed me new phones.
examples.zh: 銷售員向我介紹新手機。

examples.en: A friendly salesperson helped us.
examples.zh: 一位親切的銷售員幫了我們。

examples.en: The cashier gave me my change.
I work as a cashier on weekends.
The librarian helped me find a book.
examples.zh: 圖書館員幫我找到一本書。

examples.en: Please be quiet, said the librarian.
examples.zh: 圖書館員說請保持安靜。

examples.en: The mechanic fixed my car engine.
examples.zh: 技師修好了我的車引擎。

examples.en: Ask the mechanic to check the brakes.
We called a plumber for the leak.
examples.zh: 我們找了水管工來修漏水。

examples.en: The plumber fixed our sink.
examples.zh: 水管工修好了我們的水槽。

examples.en: The electrician wired the new house.
Call an electrician for the broken light.
The carpenter built a wooden table.
My grandfather was a carpenter.
The waitress recommended the soup.
examples.zh: 女服務生推薦了那道湯。

examples.en: She works as a waitress at night.
The banker helped me open an account.
He works as a banker downtown.

img: banker in suit at bank desk

examples.en: The soldier stood at the gate.
Her brother is a soldier.
The professor gave a great lecture.
examples.zh: 教授講了一堂很棒的課。

examples.en: She became a professor at thirty.
The veterinarian treated our sick dog.
examples.zh: 獸醫治好了我們生病的狗。

examples.en: She trained to be a veterinarian.
The architect designed a tall tower.
examples.zh: 建築師設計了一座高塔。

examples.en: He is a talented young architect.
examples.zh: 他是位有才華的年輕建築師。

img: architect with building model and plans

examples.en: The receptionist greeted every guest.
examples.zh: 接待員向每位客人問好。

examples.en: Ask the receptionist for the key.

img: receptionist smiling at hotel front desk

examples.en: The translator turned English into Chinese.
She works as a translator online.
The consultant gave us smart advice.
examples.zh: 顧問給了我們聰明的建議。

examples.en: He is a business consultant.
The entrepreneur started three companies.
examples.zh: 這位創業家開了三家公司。

examples.en: She is a young entrepreneur.
The surgeon performed a long operation.
examples.zh: 外科醫生做了一場長手術。

examples.en: He wants to become a heart surgeon.
examples.zh: 他想成為心臟外科醫生。

img: surgeon in operating room with mask

examples.en: The journalist wrote about the election.
examples.zh: 這位新聞工作者報導了選舉。

examples.en: She is an award-winning journalist.
examples.zh: 她是位得獎的新聞工作者。

examples.en: The technician set up the network.
A lab technician ran the tests.
examples.zh: 實驗室技術人員做了檢測。

examples.en: The supervisor checked our progress.
examples.zh: 主管檢查了我們的進度。

examples.en: Report the problem to your supervisor.
examples.zh: 把問題回報給你的主管。

examples.en: The pharmacist explained the medicine.
Ask the pharmacist about side effects.
